datasetsPartialFields.title: Доля profit сделок от всего profit

field.title: Доля Revenue
field.formula:
IF SUM(SUM([revenue]) TOTAL) <> 0 THEN
    IF SUM([revenue]) / SUM(SUM([revenue]) TOTAL) < 0.00005 THEN
        NULL
    ELSE
        SUM([revenue]) / SUM(SUM([revenue]) TOTAL)
    END
ELSE
    NULL
END

    ELSE

    END

field.title: Доля сделок закрытая до 30 дней
field.formula:
IF COUNTD([crm_id]) <> 0 THEN
    IF COUNTD_IF([crm_id], [time_warming] <= 30) / COUNTD([crm_id]) < 0.00005 THEN
        NULL
    ELSE
        COUNTD_IF([crm_id], [time_warming] <= 30) / COUNTD([crm_id])
    END
ELSE
    NULL
END
field.guid_formula:
IF COUNTD([crm_id_f799]) <> 0 THEN
    IF COUNTD_IF([crm_id_f799], [time_warming_fab1] <= 30) / COUNTD([crm_id_f799]) < 0.00005 THEN
        NULL
    ELSE
        COUNTD_IF([crm_id_f799], [time_warming_fab1] <= 30) / COUNTD([crm_id_f799])
    END
ELSE
    NULL
END

field.title: Период
field.formula:
IF [period] = 'День' THEN
    DATETRUNC([date_booking], 'day')
ELSEIF [period] = 'Неделя' THEN
    DATETRUNC([date_booking], 'week')
ELSEIF [period] = 'Месяц' THEN
    DATETRUNC([date_booking], 'month')
ELSEIF [period] = 'Год' THEN
    DATETRUNC([date_booking], 'year')
ELSEIF [period] = 'Все' THEN
    NULL
END
field.guid_formula:
IF [period] = 'День' THEN
    DATETRUNC([date_booking_4c5e], 'day')
ELSEIF [period] = 'Неделя' THEN
    DATETRUNC([date_booking_4c5e], 'week')
ELSEIF [period] = 'Месяц' THEN
    DATETRUNC([date_booking_4c5e], 'month')
ELSEIF [period] = 'Год' THEN
    DATETRUNC([date_booking_4c5e], 'year')
ELSEIF [period] = 'Все' THEN
    NULL
END
